title: Amira and the Missing Moon
synopsis: When young Amira notices the moon is missing from her bedroom window, she feels scared and sad. With the help of her diverse group of friends and her own brave heart, she embarks on a gentle nighttime adventure to find the moon and discovers it was just hiding behind clouds all along.

pages.text: Amira loved looking at the moon before bedtime. Every night, she would peek out her window and wave goodnight to the bright, round moon. But tonight was different. Tonight, the moon was gone!

illustration.description: A young girl with long black hair and brown skin wearing purple pajamas stands at a bedroom window, looking up at a dark sky with no moon visible. Her room has warm yellow lighting from a bedside lamp, colorful books on shelves, and a cozy bed with patterned blankets. Her expression shows surprise and concern.
illustration.alt: Amira at her bedroom window looking for the missing moon

pages.text: Amira felt scared and sad. Where could the moon be? She pressed her nose against the cool window glass and searched the dark sky. 'Moon, where are you?' she whispered softly.

illustration.description: Close-up view of Amira's face pressed against the window glass, her brown eyes wide with worry. The glass shows her reflection slightly, and outside is a deep blue night sky with twinkling stars but no moon. Her expression conveys both sadness and determination.
illustration.alt: Amira looking worried as she searches for the moon

pages.text: Amira decided to be brave. She put on her fuzzy slippers and tiptoed outside. Her friend Carlos was watering his abuela's garden next door. 'The moon is missing!' Amira told him. Carlos felt worried too.

illustration.description: Amira in purple pajamas and fuzzy pink slippers stands in a garden next to Carlos, a boy with curly brown hair wearing a green t-shirt. He holds a small watering can near colorful flowers. Both children look up at the starry sky with concerned expressions. The scene is lit by soft porch lights.
illustration.alt: Amira and Carlos looking up at the sky together

pages.text: Soon their friend Zoe joined them. Zoe had red curly hair and freckles on her cheeks. 'Maybe the moon is playing hide-and-seek!' she said cheerfully. The three friends felt hopeful as they looked up together.

illustration.description: Three children stand together in the garden - Amira, Carlos, and Zoe with bright red curly hair and freckles wearing a yellow nightgown. All three are pointing up at different parts of the sky, their faces showing hope and friendship. The garden around them has purple and pink flowers.
illustration.alt: Three friends searching the sky together for the moon

pages.text: Just then, a gentle breeze blew across the sky. The fluffy gray clouds began to move away slowly. Behind the biggest cloud, something bright started to peek out. It was the moon!

illustration.description: The night sky shows gray clouds moving apart with a bright crescent of the moon beginning to appear from behind the largest cloud. Soft silver moonbeams start to shine down. The three children below look up with expressions of wonder and excitement, their faces beginning to be lit by the returning moonlight.
illustration.alt: The moon appearing from behind moving clouds

pages.text: Amira felt so happy! The moon wasn't missing - it was just hiding behind the clouds. 'Goodnight, moon!' all three friends called out together. Amira waved and felt brave and sleepy. Now she was ready for sweet dreams.

illustration.description: All three children wave happily at a full, bright moon now visible in the clear night sky. Amira is in the center with the biggest smile, Carlos and Zoe on either side. The moon seems to have a gentle, smiling face. Warm yellow porch lights create a cozy glow around the children as they celebrate finding their friend the moon.
illustration.alt: Happy children waving goodnight to the bright moon

metadata.illustrationStyle: Bright, cheerful cartoon style with expressive faces. Bold primary colors. Rounded, friendly shapes. Slightly textured backgrounds like construction paper.

questions.question: How did Amira feel when she couldn't see the moon?
questions.explanation: Amira felt scared and sad when she noticed the moon was missing from her window.

questions.question: Who helped Amira look for the moon?
questions.explanation: Amira's friends Carlos and Zoe joined her to help search for the missing moon.

questions.question: Where was the moon hiding?
questions.explanation: The moon was hiding behind fluffy gray clouds in the sky.

questions.question: How did Amira feel when she found the moon?
questions.explanation: When Amira found the moon, she felt happy and brave, and was ready for sweet dreams.

pages.title: Fill in the Missing Words
pages.text: Amira loved looking at the _____ before bedtime. She felt _____ when it was missing, but her _____ helped her look for it.

pages.title: Complete the Story
pages.text: The moon was hiding behind the _____. When it came out, all the children felt _____. They waved and said '_____!'
